prompt: Render a concise summary deck titled 'Agent summary: release-notes-writer' of this built agent: its goal, model, tools, policies, adversarial hardening, and a-la-carte outputs. Slide 1 (section_id 0) is the title/overview and MUST lead. Use one slide per entry in `findings`.
title: Agent summary: release-notes-writer

findings.headline: Agent: release-notes-writer
findings.subtitle: Goal: Turn a list of merged pull requests into a clear, user-facing release-notes section grouped by Added / Changed / Fixed, with one plain-language line per change.

findings.headline: Policies
bullets: Never invent a change that is not backed by a merged PR title or body.
Group every change under exactly one of Added / Changed / Fixed.
